sellerContext.offerSummary: We help local service businesses improve outbound conversion with tailored visual proposals.
differentiators: Each proposal is personalized from the target company's public footprint
Decks are generated in minutes instead of days
sellerContext.targetCustomer: Founders and revenue leaders at SMBs and mid-market companies
proofPoints: Reduced proposal turnaround time by 90 percent
constraints: Do not make unverifiable claims about the target company

questionnaire.audience: Founder or head of growth at the target company
questionnaire.objective: Convince the target to take a discovery call about improving outbound performance
questionnaire.extraInstructions: Keep each card concise and easy to skim.

targets.notes: Mention local market positioning if it is clearly visible.
